name: Entanglement & Emergence of Spacetime (It from Qubit)

concepts.name: Entanglement entropy
concepts.definition: Von Neumann entropy S_A = -Tr(rho_A ln rho_A) of the reduced density matrix of a subregion A; measures quantum correlations between A and its complement. In QFT it obeys an area law with a UV cutoff and is the central quantity translated into geometry in holography.

concepts.name: Ryu-Takayanagi formula
concepts.definition: S_A = Area(gamma_A)/4G_N: entanglement entropy of a boundary region equals the area of the bulk minimal codimension-2 surface anchored on the boundary of A and homologous to A. Geometrizes entanglement.

concepts.name: HRT covariant entanglement entropy
concepts.definition: Covariant generalization of Ryu-Takayanagi to time-dependent states: the bulk surface is extremal (not minimal) in the full Lorentzian geometry, with the smallest-area extremum chosen; reduces to RT on static slices.

concepts.name: Generalized entropy
concepts.definition: S_gen = Area(Sigma)/4G_N + S_bulk(Sigma): sum of geometric area term and bulk quantum-field entanglement entropy; individually UV-divergent but the sum is finite (G_N renormalization). The exact entropy of a type-II von Neumann algebra in gravity.

concepts.name: Quantum extremal surface (QES)
concepts.definition: Surface extremizing generalized entropy S_gen = A/4G_N + S_bulk (Engelhardt-Wall 2014), with the minimum taken over solutions; valid to all orders in bulk Planck constant and lies outside the causal domain of both A and its complement. Key to the Page curve.

concepts.name: FLM quantum correction
concepts.definition: Faulkner-Lewkowycz-Maldacena one-loop quantum correction to RT: S_A = Area/4G_N + S_bulk, where S_bulk is the entanglement entropy of bulk fields across the RT surface.

concepts.name: Island formula
concepts.definition: S(rad) = min ext_I [Area(boundary I)/4G_N + S_bulk(rad union I)]: radiation entropy as a minimum over disconnected bulk islands I in the black hole interior; non-trivial islands after the Page time produce a unitary Page curve.

concepts.name: Page curve
concepts.definition: The time-dependence of the entanglement entropy of Hawking radiation that rises then falls, signaling unitary black hole evaporation; reproduced by QES + islands + replica wormholes.

concepts.name: Replica wormholes
concepts.definition: New saddle points of the gravitational path integral in which the n replica copies are joined by a bulk wormhole; reproduce the island formula and the unitary Page curve, implying the path integral may compute an ensemble average (factorization puzzle).

concepts.name: ER=EPR
concepts.definition: Conjecture (Maldacena-Susskind 2013) that quantum entanglement (EPR) between two systems is equivalent to an Einstein-Rosen bridge (ER, wormhole) connecting them; a maximally entangled pair of black holes is a wormhole. Proposed resolution of the firewall paradox.

concepts.name: Thermofield double (TFD)
concepts.definition: Pure entangled state |TFD> = Z^{-1/2} sum_n exp(-beta E_n/2)|n>_L|n>_R of two CFT copies, dual to the eternal two-sided black hole in AdS (Maldacena 2001); the horizon encodes the entanglement.

concepts.name: Entanglement builds geometry (Van Raamsdonk)
concepts.definition: Thesis that classically connected spacetime emerges from quantum entanglement; disentangling the degrees of freedom of two regions makes them pull apart and pinch off, quantified by standard entanglement measures.

concepts.name: First law of entanglement
concepts.definition: delta S_A = delta <H_A>: to first order in perturbations, the change in entanglement entropy equals the change in expectation value of the modular Hamiltonian H_A; the exact quantum analog of dE = T dS. For ball-shaped regions H_A is a local integral of the stress tensor.

concepts.name: Einstein equations from entanglement
concepts.definition: Faulkner et al. 2014: the set of first laws of entanglement for all ball-shaped boundary regions is equivalent, via RT, to the linearized Einstein equations about pure AdS; nonlinear extension recovers full Einstein equations at second order. Gravity emerges from entanglement thermodynamics.

concepts.name: Modular Hamiltonian
concepts.definition: H_A = -ln rho_A; generator of modular (Tomita-Takesaki) flow. The JLMS relation decomposes the boundary modular Hamiltonian into the RT area operator plus the bulk modular Hamiltonian of the entanglement wedge.

concepts.name: JLMS relation
concepts.definition: Boundary relative entropy equals bulk relative entropy of corresponding states in the entanglement wedge (Jafferis-Lewkowycz-Maldacena-Suh 2016); equivalently H_A^CFT = (area operator)/4G_N + H_bulk. Underpins entanglement wedge reconstruction and exact RT.

concepts.name: Entanglement wedge reconstruction / subregion duality
concepts.definition: Bulk operators in the entanglement wedge of a boundary region A are reconstructible from operators on A (via the Petz map or modular flow); the entanglement wedge, not just the causal wedge, is the reconstructable region.

concepts.name: Holographic quantum error correction
concepts.definition: Bulk logical qubits are redundantly encoded into boundary physical qubits; explains subregion duality, radial commutativity and the resilience of bulk reconstruction to boundary erasures.

concepts.name: HaPPY code
concepts.definition: Holographic tensor-network code of perfect tensors (pentagons/hexagons) on a hyperbolic lattice (Pastawski-Yoshida-Harlow-Preskill 2015); an exactly solvable toy model of AdS/CFT obeying RT and negative tripartite information.

concepts.name: MERA tensor network
concepts.definition: Multiscale entanglement renormalization ansatz for critical ground states; its emergent radial (RG-scale) direction is interpreted as a discrete slice of AdS (Swingle 2012), realizing holographic geometry from entanglement renormalization.

concepts.name: Tensor network holography
concepts.definition: General program building emergent bulk geometry from tensor networks whose link structure encodes entanglement; includes MERA, HaPPY, hyperinvariant networks, and lifted/random networks reproducing RT.

concepts.name: Bit threads
concepts.definition: Max-flow/min-cut reformulation of RT (Freedman-Headrick 2016): S_A is the maximum flux of a divergence-free, norm-bounded vector field through A; Planck-thickness threads represent bilateral entanglement and naturally implement monogamy and nesting.

concepts.name: Holographic entropy cone
concepts.definition: The set of linear inequalities (subadditivity, strong subadditivity, monogamy of mutual information, and higher-party inequalities) characterizing which entropy vectors are realizable by RT/HRT minimal surfaces; a necessary condition for a state to have a classical geometric dual. The covariant (HRT) cone was proven equivalent to the static (RT) cone in 2026 via a no-short-cut theorem.

concepts.name: Holographic complexity
concepts.definition: Computational complexity of a boundary state dual to the maximal-slice volume (complexity=volume, CV) or to the Wheeler-DeWitt patch action (complexity=action, CA); grows linearly in time long after thermalization, describing black hole interior growth.

concepts.name: Wheeler-DeWitt patch
concepts.definition: Bulk spacetime region whose gravitational action equals the boundary state's complexity in the complexity=action conjecture; bounded by null sheets from the boundary slice.

concepts.name: Quantum focusing conjecture (QFC)
concepts.definition: The quantum expansion Theta = (4G_N/sqrt(h)) dS_gen/dlambda is non-increasing along a null congruence (quantum sharpening of Raychaudhuri); implies the Bousso bound, QNEC, and consistency of the QES prescription.

concepts.name: Quantum null energy condition (QNEC)
concepts.definition: <T_kk> >= (1/2pi sqrt(h)) S''_A: a lower bound on the null-projected stress tensor by the second variation of entanglement entropy; the non-gravitational limit of QFC, proven for free, holographic and general Poincare-invariant QFTs.

concepts.name: Covariant entropy (Bousso) bound
concepts.definition: Entropy on a light-sheet does not exceed A/4G_N; the generalized (quantum) Bousso bound follows from QFC.

concepts.name: Traversable wormhole
concepts.definition: An Einstein-Rosen bridge rendered traversable by negative average null energy from a double-trace deformation coupling the two boundaries (Gao-Jafferis-Wall 2017); interpreted via ER=EPR as quantum teleportation; cannot violate causality.

concepts.name: Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model
concepts.definition: N Majorana fermions with random all-to-all couplings; in the large-N IR limit it has an emergent reparametrization symmetry governed by the Schwarzian action, saturates the chaos bound (maximal chaos), and realizes near-AdS2 (JT) holography.

concepts.name: Schwarzian action
concepts.definition: Effective IR action proportional to the Schwarzian derivative Sch(f,t) = f'''/f' - (3/2)(f''/f')^2, governing the soft reparametrization mode of JT gravity and SYK; pseudo-Goldstone of broken conformal reparametrization symmetry.

concepts.name: Near-AdS2 / JT gravity holography
concepts.definition: Duality between nearly-AdS2 Jackiw-Teitelboim gravity and the Schwarzian sector of SYK at low temperature; the simplest controllable model of emergent holography and gravitational dynamics.

concepts.name: Chaos bound (Lyapunov)
concepts.definition: Maldacena-Shenker-Stanford bound lambda_L <= 2pi/beta on the Lyapunov growth of out-of-time-order correlators; saturated by black holes and the SYK model (maximal chaos).

concepts.name: von Neumann algebra crossed product / type II
concepts.definition: Including the gravitational constraint changes the algebra of observables in a subregion from type III_1 to type II, permitting a well-defined (renormalized) entropy; gives an algebraic origin of A/4G and a framework for islands, firewalls and emergent time via modular flow.

concepts.name: Subregion-subalgebra duality
concepts.definition: Algebraic refinement of entanglement-wedge reconstruction: a boundary subalgebra is dual to a bulk subregion, encoding emergence of bulk spacetime structure in the large-N limit.

concepts.name: Emergent time
concepts.definition: Open problem of deriving the time coordinate (not just spatial directions) from quantum information; approached via half-sided modular flow, Connes cocycle, and pseudo-entropy / timelike entanglement in cosmological and de Sitter holography.

concepts.name: Pseudo-entropy / timelike entanglement
concepts.definition: Generalization of entanglement entropy to non-Hermitian transition density matrices; generically complex-valued, used as a probe of the emergence of time in cosmological and de Sitter holography.

concepts.name: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy
concepts.definition: S_BH = A/4G_N: entropy of a black hole horizon; the special case of RT/generalized entropy for the horizon, and the historical seed of the area-law and holographic intuition.

formulas.name: Entanglement entropy
formulas.meaning: Von Neumann entropy of the reduced density matrix; the central information-theoretic quantity translated into geometry.

formulas.name: Ryu-Takayanagi formula
formulas.meaning: Entanglement entropy of boundary region A equals the area of the bulk minimal surface anchored on dA and homologous to A, divided by 4G_N.

formulas.name: HRT covariant formula
formulas.meaning: Covariant entanglement entropy via extremal (not merely minimal) codimension-2 surfaces in the full Lorentzian bulk; smallest-area extremum chosen.

formulas.name: Generalized entropy
formulas.meaning: Finite, UV-renormalized sum of geometric area term and bulk-field entanglement entropy; extremized by the QES and monitored by the QFC.

formulas.name: Quantum extremal surface prescription
formulas.meaning: Entropy from extremizing then minimizing generalized entropy over all surfaces; valid to all orders in the bulk Planck constant.

formulas.name: Island formula
formulas.meaning: Radiation entropy as a minimum over interior islands I; non-trivial islands after the Page time give the unitary Page curve.

formulas.name: First law of entanglement
formulas.meaning: To first order, change in entanglement entropy equals change in modular-Hamiltonian expectation value; exact quantum analog of dE = T dS.

formulas.name: Linearized Einstein from entanglement
formulas.meaning: First laws of entanglement for all ball-shaped regions are equivalent, via RT, to linearized Einstein equations about AdS.

formulas.name: JLMS relation
formulas.meaning: Boundary modular Hamiltonian = RT area operator + bulk modular Hamiltonian; boundary relative entropy equals bulk relative entropy.

formulas.name: Bit threads (max-flow)
formulas.meaning: RT recast as max flow of a divergence-free, norm-bounded vector field; max flow equals min-cut (RT) area.

formulas.name: Quantum null energy condition
formulas.meaning: Lower bound on null energy by the second variation of entropy along a null deformation; non-gravitational limit of QFC.

formulas.name: Quantum focusing conjecture
formulas.meaning: Quantum expansion is non-increasing along a null congruence; quantum generalization of focusing implying Bousso bound and QNEC.

formulas.name: Complexity = volume / action
formulas.meaning: Boundary state complexity dual to maximal-slice volume (CV) or Wheeler-DeWitt patch action (CA); both grow linearly long after thermalization.

formulas.name: Thermofield double state
formulas.meaning: Pure entangled state of two CFT copies dual to the eternal two-sided AdS black hole; the horizon encodes the entanglement.

formulas.name: Schwarzian action and chaos bound
formulas.meaning: Low-energy SYK / JT dynamics governed by the Schwarzian; saturates the maximal chaos bound, a black-hole signature.

references.title: Eternal black holes in anti-de Sitter
references.significance: Thermofield double; eternal two-sided AdS black hole as an entangled pair of CFTs - seed of ER=EPR.

references.title: Holographic derivation of entanglement entropy from AdS/CFT
references.significance: Founding RT formula S=A/4G; geometrizes entanglement entropy. Breakthrough Prize 2015, Dirac Medal 2024.

references.authors: V. Hubeny, M. Rangamani, T. Takayanagi
references.title: A covariant holographic entanglement entropy proposal
references.significance: HRT covariant extension of RT via extremal surfaces for time-dependent spacetimes.

references.title: Building up spacetime with quantum entanglement
references.significance: Manifesto of the pillar: entanglement glues spacetime; disentangling pulls regions apart.

references.title: Entanglement renormalization and holography
references.significance: MERA tensor network as a discrete slice of AdS; emergent radial RG direction.

references.title: Generalized gravitational entropy
references.significance: Proof of RT via the bulk replica trick (analytic continuation of conical defects).

references.authors: T. Faulkner, A. Lewkowycz, J. Maldacena
references.title: Quantum corrections to holographic entanglement entropy
references.significance: FLM one-loop correction S = A/4G + S_bulk to the RT formula.

references.title: Cool horizons for entangled black holes
references.significance: ER=EPR conjecture: entanglement equals Einstein-Rosen bridges; conjectured firewall resolution.

references.authors: T. Faulkner, M. Guica, T. Hartman, R. C. Myers, M. Van Raamsdonk
references.title: Gravitation from entanglement in holographic CFTs
references.significance: Derives linearized Einstein equations about AdS from the first law of entanglement for all ball regions.

references.title: Quantum extremal surfaces: holographic entanglement entropy beyond the classical regime
references.significance: Defines the QES by extremizing generalized entropy; valid to all orders in bulk hbar.

references.authors: F. Pastawski, B. Yoshida, D. Harlow, J. Preskill
references.title: Holographic quantum error-correcting codes: toy models for the bulk/boundary correspondence
references.significance: HaPPY code: exactly solvable QEC toy model of AdS/CFT obeying RT and subregion duality.

references.authors: R. Bousso, Z. Fisher, S. Leichenauer, A. C. Wall
references.title: A quantum focusing conjecture
references.significance: QFC unifying Bousso bound, QNEC and consistency of the QES prescription.

references.authors: A. R. Brown, D. A. Roberts, L. Susskind, B. Swingle, Y. Zhao
references.title: Complexity equals action
references.significance: Complexity = action of the Wheeler-DeWitt patch; black holes as fastest computers.

references.authors: D. L. Jafferis, A. Lewkowycz, J. Maldacena, S. J. Suh
references.title: Relative entropy equals bulk relative entropy
references.significance: JLMS relation; boundary modular Hamiltonian = RT area operator + bulk modular Hamiltonian.

references.authors: X. Dong, D. Harlow, A. C. Wall
references.title: Reconstruction of bulk operators within the entanglement wedge in gauge-gravity duality
references.significance: Establishes entanglement wedge (not just causal wedge) reconstruction.

references.title: Bit threads and holographic entanglement
references.significance: Max-flow/min-cut reformulation of RT without explicit minimal surfaces.

references.title: Remarks on the Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev model
references.significance: Large-N solution of SYK; Schwarzian action, maximal chaos, near-AdS2 holography.

references.authors: P. Gao, D. L. Jafferis, A. C. Wall
references.title: Traversable wormholes via a double trace deformation
references.significance: Negative null energy from a double-trace coupling renders an ER bridge traversable; ER=EPR teleportation.

references.authors: A. Almheiri, N. Engelhardt, D. Marolf, H. Maxfield
references.title: The entropy of bulk quantum fields and the entanglement wedge of an evaporating black hole
references.significance: Introduces islands; reproduces the Page curve from the QES prescription.

references.title: Entanglement wedge reconstruction and the information paradox
references.significance: Independent QES/island derivation of the Page curve via entanglement wedge reconstruction.

references.authors: V. Chandrasekaran, G. Penington, E. Witten
references.title: Large N algebras and generalized entropy
references.significance: Crossed product; gravity turns the type III_1 algebra into type II, giving an algebraic origin of generalized entropy. [Note: arXiv ID corrected from 2206.10780 (which is CLPW 'An Algebra of Observables for de Sitter Space') to 2209.10454.]

references.authors: D. Jafferis, A. Zlokapa, J. D. Lykken, D. K. Kolchmeyer, S. I. Davis, N. Lauk, H. Neven, M. Spiropulu
references.title: Traversable wormhole dynamics on a quantum processor
references.significance: Sparsified SYK on Google Sycamore reproduces traversable-wormhole teleportation dynamics; QG in the lab.

references.title: Lectures on entanglement, von Neumann algebras, and emergence of spacetime
references.significance: Modern review codifying the algebraic (type II, crossed product) program for emergence of spacetime and time.

references.authors: A. Almheiri, T. Hartman, J. Maldacena, E. Shaghoulian, A. Tajdini
references.title: The entropy of Hawking radiation
references.significance: Review of islands and replica wormholes for the black hole information problem.

references.title: Holographic entanglement entropy
references.significance: Standard monograph/review of holographic entanglement entropy.

references.title: TASI lectures on the emergence of bulk physics in AdS/CFT
references.significance: Pedagogical account of holography as quantum error correction, reconstruction and modular theory.

references.authors: R. Bousso, Z. Fisher, J. Koeller, S. Leichenauer, A. C. Wall
references.title: Proof of the quantum null energy condition
references.significance: Proof of QNEC for holographic QFTs from entanglement entropy.

references.title: Loop quantum gravity, exact holographic mapping, and holographic entanglement entropy
references.significance: Explicit bridge from LQG spin networks to tensor networks and holographic entanglement entropy.

references.title: de Sitter connectivity from holographic entanglement
references.significance: Connectivity of de Sitter emerges from entanglement of two antipodal observers' causal patches; covariant HEE prescription with quantum corrections; extends entanglement-emergence beyond AdS.

references.title: Essay: Emergent holographic spacetime from quantum information
references.significance: PRL essay reviewing open problems of emergence: which quantum circuits correspond to holographic spacetime, and whether the time coordinate emerges from quantum information.

references.title: Quantum Gravity (Spring 2024 edition)
references.significance: Philosophical framing of emergent spacetime and the status of holographic dualities.

references.authors: A. Belin, S. Bintanja, A. Castro, W. Knop
references.title: Symmetric product orbifold universality and the mirage of an emergent spacetime
references.significance: Critique: symmetric product orbifolds reproduce BTZ-like correlators at large N without being dual to semiclassical gravity - holographic-looking features without genuinely emergent geometry.

references.title: Entropy and area
references.significance: Entanglement entropy of a QFT obeys an area law - the bridge from entanglement to Bekenstein-Hawking entropy.

references.authors: H. Casini, M. Huerta, R. C. Myers
references.title: Towards a derivation of holographic entanglement entropy
references.significance: Modular Hamiltonian of a ball equals a boost generator; key ingredient for deriving Einstein equations from entanglement.

references.authors: G. Penington, S. H. Shenker, D. Stanford, Z. Yang
references.title: Replica wormholes and the black hole interior
references.significance: Derives the island rule from replica wormhole saddles of the gravitational path integral; factorization puzzle.

references.authors: A. Almheiri, R. Mahajan, J. Maldacena, Y. Zhao
references.title: The Page curve of Hawking radiation from semiclassical geometry
references.significance: Islands in 2D gravity coupled to holographic matter give an explicit Page curve, connecting radiation to interior via ER=EPR.

references.title: Eternal traversable wormhole
references.significance: Two coupled SYK models realize an eternal traversable near-AdS2 wormhole; ground state close to the thermofield double.

references.title: Entanglement entropy and quantum field theory
references.significance: Replica-trick derivation of S=(c/3)ln(l) in 2D CFT - the field-theory side of the sharpest RT test.

references.title: Holographic entanglement entropy for general higher derivative gravity
references.significance: Generalizes RT beyond Einstein gravity (Wald entropy + extrinsic-curvature corrections); basis for alpha-prime/stringy corrections.

references.title: Graph models for covariant holographic entropy I
references.significance: Conditional no-short-cut theorem establishes equivalence of the covariant (HRT) and static (RT) holographic entropy cones under existence of exposed regions; extends the graph-model machinery to time-dependent holographic states.

references.authors: G. Grimaldi, M. Headrick, V. E. Hubeny
references.title: A new characterization of the holographic entropy cone
references.significance: Markov-state majorization test characterizing the holographic entropy cone.

openProblems.statement: Derive the emergence of the time coordinate (not just spatial directions) from quantum entanglement / information.
openProblems.whyHard: Time is tied to the problem of time (Wheeler-DeWitt H|psi>=0); modular 'time' is not geometric time, and Lorentzian signature lacks a positive-definite density matrix to entangle.
openProblems.attempts: Half-sided modular flow, Connes cocycle, kink transform; pseudo-entropy and timelike entanglement in de Sitter / cosmological holography.

openProblems.statement: Formulate emergence of spacetime from entanglement outside AdS - in de Sitter and asymptotically flat space.
openProblems.whyHard: dS/CFT duals are non-unitary; cosmology has no AdS-like asymptotic boundary on which entanglement can be anchored, so RT surfaces and the dictionary are absent.
openProblems.attempts: dS/CFT (Strominger), de Sitter connectivity from holographic entanglement (2024), celestial/Carrollian holography, timelike-entanglement probes.

openProblems.statement: Provide a microscopic, single-theory interpretation of replica wormholes and resolve the factorization puzzle.
openProblems.whyHard: Replica wormholes imply the gravitational path integral computes an ensemble average, conflicting with factorization of a product-CFT partition function; no microscopic account exists in d>2.
openProblems.attempts: Ensemble interpretations in JT gravity (2D), half-wormholes, baby universes / alpha-states.

openProblems.statement: Find a sufficient criterion for which entanglement structures yield a classical bulk geometry.
openProblems.whyHard: Not every entangled state has a geometric dual; maximal entanglement destroys reconstructable spacetime, and holographic-looking CFTs (symmetric orbifolds) can be a 'mirage' without genuine geometry.
openProblems.attempts: Holographic entropy cone inequalities, large-N factorization, code-subspace / convexity conditions, mirage critiques (JHEP 2025).

openProblems.statement: Make the emergence of the full background (topology, cosmology) - not just perturbations about fixed AdS - follow from information-theoretic principles.
openProblems.whyHard: AdS/CFT presupposes fixed asymptotics; there is no boundary-free formulation, unlike background-independent approaches (LQG, spin foams, causal sets).
openProblems.attempts: Tensor-network and algebraic (subregion-subalgebra) constructions; speculative 'It from BC-bit' (Van Raamsdonk II).

openProblems.statement: Give an unambiguous definition of holographic complexity and resolve the CV vs CA (and 'complexity=anything') ambiguity.
openProblems.whyHard: Quantum computational complexity depends on choice of reference state, gate set and tolerance; CV and CA differ by volume-order terms and there is no canonical normalization for null boundaries.
openProblems.attempts: Complexity=anything family, Nielsen geometric complexity, Krylov/spread complexity, first-law of complexity.

openProblems.statement: Prove the quantum focusing conjecture in general, dynamical gravitational backgrounds.
openProblems.whyHard: Requires control of S_gen and its second null variation in fully dynamical gravity, where S_bulk is not computable; current proofs cover only free or holographic QFTs.
openProblems.attempts: Holographic proof of QNEC (2016), free-field proofs, restricted (e.g. perturbative AdS) QFC arguments.

openProblems.statement: Determine whether laboratory simulations (sparsified SYK on quantum processors) realize genuine emergent gravitational dynamics or merely generic chaotic scrambling.
openProblems.whyHard: Distinguishing wormhole/gravitational signatures (size winding, Shapiro delay) from generic thermalization requires implementation-independent diagnostics; sparsification may discard gravity-relevant structure.
openProblems.attempts: Sycamore experiment (2022) and follow-up critiques/comments (2023); proposals for sharper observables.

connections.description: RT, FLM, QES, JLMS and islands are all formulated within AdS/CFT; entanglement gives holography its quantum-information reading (geometry = entanglement) while holography supplies the concrete bulk dual. Bidirectional and deeply mapped.

QES + islands + replica wormholes reproduce the Page curve, resolving the information paradox; ER=EPR addresses the firewall; Bekenstein-Hawking entropy is the horizon special case of RT. Remaining gap: microscopic interpretation of replica saddles.

AdS/CFT and entanglement geometry descend from D-branes and string microstate counting (Strominger-Vafa); the entanglement picture is the information-theoretic face of the same structure. Open: whether emergence holds beyond string constructions.

QFC, QNEC, generalized second law and generalized entropy live at the semiclassical gravity / entanglement interface; QNEC is a pure-QFT statement derived from gravitational QFC. Open: QFC in fully dynamical backgrounds.

Direct conceptual ancestor: Jacobson (1995) derived Einstein equations from delta Q = T delta S on Rindler horizons; Faulkner et al. (2014) is the holographic, entanglement-exact version. Verlinde entropic gravity shares the slogan but is controversial and weakly linked to RT.

Explicit bridges: LQG spin-network states as an exact holographic mapping / tensor network (Han-Hung 2017; spin-network HEE reviews 2022; SU(2) holonomies to holographic duality via tensor networks 2024); both give area-law entanglement from discrete geometry. Gap: LQG is background independent with no preferred AdS dual; matching RT area law to the LQG area spectrum A ~ 8 pi gamma lP^2 sum sqrt(j(j+1)) is illustrative, not derived.

Sorkin-Yazdi 'spacetime entanglement entropy' on a causal set yields an area law; causal sets carry fundamental Lorentzian causality and could illuminate the emergence of time that RT handles poorly. But links to RT/QES are almost unmapped - a candidate gold connection.

Shared operator-algebraic language: von Neumann algebras, Tomita-Takesaki modular theory, factor types. The crossed-product / type II program brings entanglement into the same algebraic world as NCG; explicit bridges (spectral triples <-> entanglement entropy) are missing despite the striking shared mathematics.

Hypothetical contact via holographic RG flow (radial direction = energy scale) versus the asymptotic-safety UV fixed point, with entanglement entropy as a fixed-point probe. Essentially no literature linking entanglement emergence to functional RG - an unexplored field.

Indirect contact through celestial holography and through complexity / geometry of the state space; whether an entanglement structure of scattering states maps to emergent spacetime is essentially unmapped - speculative but suggestive.

Emergent time, pseudo-entropy and de Sitter holography point toward cosmological applications (entanglement across the cosmological horizon, cosmological constant from quantum corrections). No controlled holographic dual of cosmology yet; relation to initial conditions and the arrow of time is open.

RT and the covariant Bousso bound are quantum-information sharpenings of the holographic principle: degrees of freedom scale with boundary area; QFC yields the generalized (quantum) Bousso bound. Well explored within holography.

The classical RT/HRT regime is the supergravity (large-N, strong-coupling) limit of the bulk; FLM/QES add the one-loop and all-orders quantum corrections on top of the supergravity saddle. The supergravity action is what complexity=action evaluates on the WDW patch.

Holographic-looking entanglement features (e.g. symmetric product orbifold CFTs reproducing RT-like behavior) can be a 'mirage' without a genuine classical bulk, and maximally entangled states have no reconstructable spacetime - so RT behavior is not sufficient for emergent geometry. Also bears on the problem of time and background independence.

Sparsified SYK on the Google Sycamore processor (2022) and optical-cavity SYK simulations reproduce traversable-wormhole teleportation signatures (size winding, Shapiro delay), a 'QG in the lab' program; contested as to whether it probes gravity or generic scrambling.

GFT and spin-network condensates build emergent geometry from many quanta; entanglement of GFT/tensor-network states and area-law scaling parallel the holographic entanglement program, but explicit GFT-RT dictionaries are essentially absent.
